studyName: Genomic and Immune Profiling of Breast Cancer Brain Metastases

tables.description: This sample attributes table contains sample ID, body site where sample was collected, body site type, analyte type, tumor status, histological type, and tissue storage method.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: BODY_SITE_TYPE
variables.description: Type of body site, e.g. blood, brain metastasis, or extracranial tumor (unknown if primary or metastasis). Blood was collected around the time of craniotomy.

variables.name: CRANIO_ID
variables.description: Craniotomy ID (i.e. BrM Surgery ID)

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: PAM50_SUBTYPE
variables.description: PAM50 intrinsic subtype inferred from RNA sample

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SEQUENCED_BRM
variables.description: Indicates the forty brain metastasis (BrM) surgeries that resulted in a sequenced brain metastasis specimen

variables.name: SPECIMEN_ID
variables.description: Specimen ID

variables.name: STATUS_BRM_AT_SURGERY
variables.description: Status of brain metastasis at surgery

variables.name: STORAGE
variables.description: Tissue storage method, e.g. fresh, frozen, or FFPE

variables.name: TRT_AFTER_BRM_SURGERY_RADIATION
variables.description: Radiation therapy treatment after brain metastasis surgery (WBRT = whole brain radiation therapy, SRS = Stereotactic radiosurgery)

variables.name: TRT_AFTER_BRM_SURGERY_SUBSEQUENT_SURGERY
variables.description: Subsequent surgery treatment after brain metastasis surgery

variables.name: TRT_AFTER_BRM_SURGERY_SYSTEMIC
variables.description: Systemic therapy treatment after brain metastasis surgery

variables.name: TRT_BEFORE_BRM_SURGERY_PRIOR_SURGERY
variables.description: Prior surgery treatment before brain metastasis surgery

variables.name: TRT_BEFORE_BRM_SURGERY_RADIATION
variables.description: Radiation therapy treatment before brain metastasis surgery (WBRT = whole brain radiation therapy, SRS = Stereotactic radiosurgery)

variables.name: TRT_BEFORE_BRM_SURGERY_SYSTEMIC
variables.description: Systemic therapy treatment before brain metastasis surgery

variables.name: TRT_STATUS_BRM_AT_SURGERY
variables.description: Treatment status of brain metastasis at surgery

variables.name: YEAR_BRM_SURGERY
variables.description: Year of brain metastasis surgery

tables.description: This subject phenotype table contains subject ID, race, ethnicity, and gender.

variables.name: AGE_INIT_BC_DIAGNOSIS
variables.description: Age at initial breast cancer diagnosis

variables.name: AGE_INIT_CRANIOTOMY
variables.description: Age at initial craniotomy

variables.name: CLINICAL_SUBTYPE
variables.description: Clinical subtype, e.g. HR+ HER2-

variables.name: CLINICAL_SUBTYPE_SOURCE
variables.description: Clinical subtype source, e.g. BrM, Distant Metastasis

variables.name: ETHNICITY
variables.description: Reported ethnicity

variables.name: GENDER
variables.description: Reported gender

variables.name: MONTHS_CRANIOTOMY_TO_LAST_FOLLOWUP
variables.description: Months from initial craniotomy to death or last follow-up

variables.name: MONTHS_DIAGNOSIS_TO_CRANIOTOMY
variables.description: Months from initial breast cancer diagnosis to initial craniotomy

variables.name: MONTHS_DIAGNOSIS_TO_LAST_FOLLOWUP
variables.description: Months from initial breast cancer diagnosis to death or last follow-up

variables.name: RACE
variables.description: Reported race

variables.name: STATUS
variables.description: Patient status at the time of last follow up

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: The subject consent file includes subject ID, consent information, and biological sex.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Registered consent groups (Data Use Limitations (DUL)) as determined by submitters' Institutional Review Boards (IRB) or equivalent body

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Biological sex

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: This subject sample mapping data table contains a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
